Custom program managers for conditional cash transfer (CCT) programs.

This module provides three managers that work together:

- **CCT Eligibility Manager**: Filters households by income threshold and presence of children under a configurable age
- **CCT Entitlement Manager**: Calculates entitlements as a base amount per household plus a per-child top-up (with configurable cap)
- **CCT Cycle Manager**: Creates quarterly cycles aligned to calendar quarters (Q1-Q4) with optional automatic beneficiary enrollment

This module serves as an example for developers learning to build custom program managers.
